description.zh-Hans: 生成适用于RPG地面的可平铺像素草地，以大块草色分区、成组草叶和少量土壤露出构成，而不是逐像素随机噪点。
description.en: Generates seamless RPG grass tiles built from broad color clusters, authored grass tufts, and sparse soil exposure rather than per-pixel noise.

triggers.zh-Hans: 草地, 草坪, 草丛, 植被地面, 田野, 草原
triggers.en: grass, grassland, turf, vegetation, field, meadow

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成草地植被地面纹理，用于室外自然环境场景的地面材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a grass vegetation ground texture for outdoor natural environment scenes.
